description: Train a robot policy on a recorded dataset

parameters.dataset_repo_id: Local path or HuggingFace dataset ID

descriptions.smolvla: Vision-Language-Action model, defaults to lerobot/smolvla_base checkpoint
descriptions.act: Action Chunking with Transformers — fast, low data

parameters.push_to_hub: boolean — push trained model to HuggingFace Hub

explanation: Trains a policy (the model that maps observations → actions) using LeRobot's training pipeline. Checkpoints saved periodically (e.g. every 1000 steps). SmolVLA can initialize from pretrained checkpoint. Camera names auto-mapped when they don't match policy defaults.
expected_output: Training complete. Checkpoints saved to output_dir.

validation.rule: Checkpoint files must exist in output_dir (e.g. checkpoint_1000/)

common_errors: Video backend error — automatically switches to PyAV if TorchCodec unavailable
Camera name mismatch — tool auto-maps camera names when they don't match policy defaults
Output dir exists — choose resume, overwrite, or new directory

description: Run a trained policy autonomously on the follower arm

parameters.policy_path: HuggingFace model ID (e.g. username/my-model) or local checkpoint path
parameters.task_description: Description of the task for the policy
parameters.duration: How long to run inference in seconds
parameters.teleop_override: boolean — use leader arm to override when leader is calibrated

explanation: Runs a trained policy model in closed-loop on the follower arm. Local model paths skip HuggingFace auth. Leader not required unless using teleop override. PySerial installed automatically if missing.
expected_output: Policy running — follower arm acts autonomously

validation.rule: Follower arm moves autonomously without leader input

common_errors: HuggingFace auth required for remote Hub model IDs — local paths skip this
Wrong port — auto-detects and retries once; disconnect/reconnect if still failing
Motor sync error — run scan/diagnose, check power voltages
Windows symlink warnings — automatically suppressed by the tool
prerequisites: train_policy OR download a Hub model
